explanation: By means of / With / Marking the limit
exampleSentence: 本日をもって、このサービスは終了いたします。
exampleTranslation: This service will be terminated as of today.

explanation: In / Under (circumstances / conditions)
exampleSentence: 不況の只中にあって、彼は会社を立て直した。
exampleTranslation: In the midst of the recession, he turned the company around.

explanation: Up to / Even to the extent of / Down to
exampleSentence: 細部に至るまで丁寧にチェックした。
exampleTranslation: I carefully checked down to the smallest details.

explanation: Starting with / Beginning with
exampleSentence: 東京公演を皮切りに、全国ツアーが始まった。
exampleTranslation: Starting with the Tokyo performance, the national tour began.

explanation: In accordance with / Based on
exampleSentence: 法律に即して判断を下すべきだ。
exampleTranslation: We should make a judgment in accordance with the law.

explanation: Unique to / Only possible with / Distinctive of
usageRules: Noun + ならではの + Noun / Noun + ならではだ
exampleSentence: 職人ならではの技が光る作品だ。
exampleTranslation: This is a work that showcases craftsmanship unique to artisans.

explanation: Regardless of / Paying no attention to
exampleSentence: 周囲の心配をよそに、彼は単身で海外へ飛び立った。
exampleTranslation: Paying no attention to everyone's concerns, he set off abroad alone.

explanation: In line with / Along / In accordance with
usageRules: Noun + に沿った + Noun / Noun + に沿う
exampleSentence: お客様のご要望に沿ったプランをご提案いたします。
exampleTranslation: We will propose a plan in line with your requests.

explanation: Taking the opportunity to / Triggered by
usageRules: Noun + を機に / Verb-た + のを機に
exampleSentence: 引っ越しを機に、家具を全て新しくした。
exampleTranslation: Taking the move as an opportunity, I replaced all the furniture.

explanation: Upon reaching / When it comes to (an extreme situation)
usageRules: Verb-dictionary + に至って / Noun + に至って
exampleSentence: 事態ここに至って、ようやく彼は真相を語った。
exampleTranslation: Now that things have come to this, he finally told the truth.

explanation: Based on / Using as the basis
exampleSentence: 実際の事件をもとにして小説を書いた。
exampleTranslation: I wrote a novel based on a real incident.

explanation: Utmost / The height of (formal set phrase)
usageRules: Noun + の至り (fixed expressions: 光栄の至り, 若気の至り)
exampleSentence: このような賞をいただき、光栄の至りです。
exampleTranslation: Receiving such an award is the utmost honor.

explanation: Without (emphatic / conditional)
exampleSentence: 努力なくして成功はありえない。
exampleTranslation: Success is impossible without effort.

explanation: Even if / No matter (concessive)
exampleSentence: 今さら後悔したところで、もう遅い。
exampleTranslation: Even if you regret it now, it's already too late.

explanation: Except for / Other than / None but
exampleSentence: 彼をおいてこの仕事を任せられる者はいない。
exampleTranslation: There is no one other than him who can be entrusted with this task.

explanation: Combined with / Coupled with
exampleSentence: 美しい旋律と相まって、彼女の歌声は観客を魅了した。
exampleTranslation: Combined with the beautiful melody, her singing captivated the audience.

explanation: In line with / Conforming to (progressive form)
exampleSentence: 時代に即した新しい教育方法が求められている。
exampleTranslation: New educational methods in line with the times are needed.

explanation: Based on / In light of / Taking into account
exampleSentence: 前回の反省を踏まえて、計画を練り直した。
exampleTranslation: Based on the lessons from last time, we reworked the plan.

explanation: Cannot ... without
usageRules: Noun + なしでは + Verb-ない
exampleSentence: 水なしでは一日も生きられない。
exampleTranslation: We cannot live even a single day without water.

explanation: Through / Via / After going through
exampleSentence: 厳しい訓練を経て、彼は一人前の職人になった。
exampleTranslation: After going through rigorous training, he became a full-fledged craftsman.

explanation: With (capability / means) / If one uses
exampleSentence: 彼の能力をもってすれば、その問題も簡単に解決できるだろう。
exampleTranslation: With his ability, he could probably solve that problem easily.

explanation: Once (something happens, then ...) / As soon as
exampleSentence: あのゲームを始めたが最後、やめられなくなる。
exampleTranslation: Once you start that game, you won't be able to stop.

explanation: Nothing / Nobody other than
usageRules: Noun + をおいて + negative predicate
exampleSentence: この任務を遂行できる者をおいて他にいない。
exampleTranslation: There is nobody other than him who can carry out this mission.

explanation: If it is / If it means (formal conditional)
usageRules: Noun + とあれば / Verb-dictionary + とあれば
exampleSentence: お役に立てるとあれば、喜んで協力いたします。
exampleTranslation: If it means I can be of help, I will gladly cooperate.

explanation: Cannot bear / Unbearable / Not worthy of
usageRules: Noun + にたえない / Verb-dictionary + にたえない
exampleSentence: その光景は目にたえない悲惨なものだった。
exampleTranslation: The scene was too heartbreaking to behold.
